techniques.evidence_quote: Root Cause: Compromised vulnerable application (k8s Pod)
revealing clever privilege escalation from a Kubernetes vulnerability to full administrative access
Exploit overprivileged secrets access to retrieve IDP-related credentials
Exploit overprivileged secrets access to retrieve IDP-related credentials
uncovering expert impersonation of a unique identity provider
compromising a credential, exfiltrating data, and demanding ransom payments to avoid publication of sensitive data

attack_chain.description: Attacker exploited a vulnerability in a public-facing application running inside a Kubernetes Pod to gain initial code execution within the cluster.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Root Cause: Compromised vulnerable application (k8s Pod)

attack_chain.description: From the compromised Pod, the attacker accessed overprivileged Kubernetes Secrets to retrieve IDP-related credentials, leveraging excessive RBAC permissions on the pod's service account.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Exploit overprivileged secrets access to retrieve IDP-related credentials

attack_chain.technique_name: Escape to Host / Privilege Escalation via Kubernetes Vulnerability
attack_chain.description: The attacker leveraged a Kubernetes vulnerability to escalate from pod-level access to full administrative access over the cluster or cloud environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: revealing clever privilege escalation from a Kubernetes vulnerability to full administrative access

attack_chain.description: Using the retrieved IDP-related credentials, the attacker impersonated the identity provider to obtain cloud access tokens, enabling them to act with elevated cloud permissions.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: uncovering expert impersonation of a unique identity provider

attack_chain.description: The attacker used the stolen IDP credentials and impersonated identity to authenticate to AWS as a valid cloud account, achieving full administrative access to the AWS environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Exploit overprivileged secrets access to retrieve IDP-related credentials

attack_chain.description: With full administrative AWS access, the attacker accessed and collected data from S3 buckets in preparation for exfiltration.
The attacker exfiltrated the collected S3 data to an external location, consistent with the described data exfiltration prior to ransom demand.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: compromising a credential, exfiltrating data, and demanding ransom payments to avoid publication of sensitive data

attack_chain.description: As part of the ransomware operation, the attacker likely deleted or corrupted S3 data (cloud 'ransomware' pattern: exfiltrate then delete/encrypt to extort victim).

initial_access_vector: Exploitation of a vulnerable public-facing application running in a Kubernetes Pod (Amazon EKS)
persistence_mechanism: Impersonation of an Identity Provider (IDP) to maintain persistent valid cloud credentials
privilege_escalation: Accessed overprivileged Kubernetes Secrets from compromised Pod to retrieve IDP credentials; exploited a Kubernetes vulnerability to escalate to full administrative access
